title: Cat
settings.cat_size.label: Cat Size
settings.cat_size.description: Sprite size in the bar, in pixels.
settings.show_cpu_percent.label: Show CPU Percentage
settings.show_cpu_percent.description: Display the CPU percentage next to the cat.
settings.walk_threshold.label: Walk Threshold
settings.walk_threshold.description: CPU percentage at which the cat wakes up and starts walking.
settings.run_threshold.label: Run Threshold
settings.run_threshold.description: CPU percentage at which the cat breaks into a run.
settings.poll_interval.label: CPU Poll Interval
settings.poll_interval.description: How often to sample CPU usage, in seconds.
settings.cat_color_mode.label: Cat Color
settings.cat_color_mode.description: Use the current theme color, or pick a custom color below.
settings.cat_color.label: Custom Color
settings.cat_color.description: Used when Cat Color is set to Custom.
